subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-05-10 in Washington
subcodes.first_line: And now you, if you act in accordance with the teachings of Baha'o'llah, may rest assured that you will be aided and confirmed.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @The Holy Spirit
